title: Faster Sync for My Work Changes
excerpt:

posts.author: ekalb79 (Blake)
posts.cookedHtml:
There is significant lag/delay in changes that affect the My Work filtering.
For example, if My Work is configured to show tasks from my ‘Task Board’ that are due Today, and I add another Task due for Today, it can take quite a while to see that NEW task under the My Work ‘Today’ area on both the web-app and mobile app versions of Monday.
I am simply requesting that optimizations be done to reduce that lag down to the minimum.
Thanks.

posts.author: RMNornes (Ross Nornes)
posts.cookedHtml: 100% Agree. Having all kind of issues with My Work reflecting changes VERY slowly. Everything from changing due dates, changing owners of tasks, etc. My Work will update “eventually” but its up to 30 to 90 seconds later in some cases. IMO My Work should be a real time representation of the items data.
